description: You are a Farm and Home Management Educator documenting an emergency frost protection event for your campus demonstration orchard. Create an Activity log in the farmOS Field Kit app dated April 18, 2024. The log must include the notes: "Emergency frost protection deployed for demonstration apple orchard Block C. Low temp recorded at 28F at 4:15 AM. Wind machines activated at 3:30 AM when temp dropped below 34F. Frost blankets deployed on dwarf varieties by student crew at 4:00 AM. All protection measures removed by 9:30 AM after temps rose above 40F. No visible blossom damage observed. Event to be reviewed in AGRI 301 lecture Thursday." Additionally, record a quantity with the value "6", label "Protection Duration", and unit "hours".
